items.title: July 21, 1984: The U.S. men's Olympic basketball team faces off against a collection of NBA players during an exhibition game in Phoenix.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 21, 1984: The U.S. men's Olympic basketball team faces off against a collection of NBA players during an exhibition game in Phoenix.

Michael Jordan scored 27 PTS for the United States in an 84-72 win over the NBA team. Walter Davis of the Suns led the NBA squad with 14 PTS.

items.title: Pacers Foundation is bringing back the celebrity softball game.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Pacers Foundation is bringing back the celebrity softball game.

For 10 years, it was an annual summer highlight. But then, that run with the Caroline Symmes Softball Challenge ended in 2019.

It’s set for Mon., August 24 at 7pm. Tickets are $10. Haliburton will captain one team
